meaning: adj.(已持续)长时间的,为时甚久的
examples: The finding points to longstanding evidence that fiber may reduce circulating female hormone levels, which could explain the reduced risk.
Longstanding poverty has been exacerbated by racial divisions.
I want to point out here that Guinea and China have longstanding friendship.
Silajdzic assured congressmen worried about the United States being drawn into the longstanding Bosnian conflict.
He points to longstanding liberal tax-exempt groups and says conservatives have been unfairly targeted.
